evals.prompt: I have a Dune app at ../dune-app-template. Add a 3D viewer page where I can browse and load CAD models from my CDF project. Add a button on the main page to reach it.
evals.expected_output: A working 3D viewer page with model browsing, Vite configured for Reveal, process polyfill in main.tsx, and a navigation button on the landing page.
expectations: @cognite/reveal, three, process, and @cognite/dune-industrial-components are in package.json dependencies
vite.config.ts has define block with process.env, process.platform, process.version, and global
vite.config.ts has resolve.alias for util, assert, process, and three pointing to three/build/three.module.js
vite.config.ts has optimizeDeps.include with process, util, assert, three, @cognite/reveal
vite.config.ts has resolve.dedupe with three
main.tsx imports process and assigns (window as unknown as Record<string, unknown>).process = process before all other imports
Viewer component wraps content in RevealKeepAlive
RevealProvider is inside RevealKeepAlive
resources prop is memoized with useMemo
onModelsLoaded callback is memoized with useCallback
SDK client is memoized with useMemo
Viewer container has an explicit height (e.g. style or className with height)
App.tsx or main page has a button or link to navigate to the 3D viewer
Viewer component is lazy-loaded with React.lazy and wrapped in Suspense

evals.prompt: I have an FDM asset with space cdf_idm and externalId pump_001. Add a 3D viewer to my asset detail page that shows the CAD model linked to this asset. The detail page is at src/AssetDetail.tsx.
evals.expected_output: A Viewer3D component using useModelsForInstanceQuery to discover models for the FDM instance, integrated into AssetDetail.tsx with proper provider nesting.
expectations: @cognite/dune-industrial-components is in package.json dependencies
Uses useModelsForInstanceQuery hook to discover 3D models from the FDM instance
Passes a DMInstanceRef with space and externalId to the query hook
RevealKeepAlive wraps RevealProvider
resources is derived from useModelsForInstanceQuery result and memoized
onModelsLoaded is wrapped in useCallback
SDK is memoized via useMemo to prevent viewer re-initialization
The viewer is rendered inside AssetDetail.tsx with an explicit height container
viewerOptions includes antiAliasingHint and ssaoQualityHint
Viewer component is lazy-loaded with React.lazy and wrapped in Suspense

evals.prompt: Add a full-screen 3D viewer that loads model ID 206509079235820 revision 576781257263693. Put it at a /viewer route.
evals.expected_output: A full-screen DirectViewer-style component loading the specific model/revision, accessible at /viewer route, with all Reveal prerequisites configured.
expectations: Component passes modelId 206509079235820 and revisionId 576781257263693 to Reveal3DResources
resources array is memoized with useMemo containing the modelId and revisionId
onModelsLoaded is wrapped in useCallback
RevealKeepAlive wraps RevealProvider
SDK is memoized via useMemo
The viewer container is full-screen (height: 100vh or h-screen or similar)
A route is set up at /viewer (react-router-dom or equivalent)
Vite config and process polyfill are configured if not already present
Viewer component is lazy-loaded with React.lazy and wrapped in Suspense
